sos.title: EMERGENCY SOS
sos.description: Pressing the button below will share your live location with emergency services and listed contacts.
sos.help_on_way: Help is on the way. Keep your GPS enabled.
sos.resolve_msg: Are you safe now? This will stop live tracking.
sos.sent_alert: Emergency contacts and authorities have been notified. Your live location is being shared.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Places you love
favorites.no_favorites_desc: Start exploring and add places to your favorites!

help.title: Help & Support
help.faq_a1: Swadeshi Yatra is an initiative to promote domestic tourism and local businesses in India, helping travelers discover hidden gems while supporting local communities.
help.faq_q2: How do I add a place to favorites?
help.faq_a2: You can add any place to your favorites by tapping the heart icon on the place card or detail screen. Your favorites are accessible from your profile.
help.faq_a3: The SOS feature allows you to send an emergency alert with your live location to authorities and emergency contacts in case of danger.
help.faq_a4: Yes, we prioritize your privacy and security. Your location is only shared when you use the SOS feature or search for nearby places.

about.title: About App
about.mission: Swadeshi Yatra is a dedicated platform designed to empower domestic tourism and local businesses under the Atmanirbhar Bharat initiative. Our mission is to help travelers explore the rich heritage, vibrant culture, and hidden landscapes of India while directly contributing to the local ecosystem.
about.copyright: © 2025 Swadeshi Yatra India. All rights reserved.

initiatives.mission_desc: is more than just a travel app. It is a movement to rediscover the soul of India and empower its people.
initiatives.dekho_body: India has everything — from the snow-capped Himalayas to the tropical beaches of the south. Why go far when paradise is right here?
initiatives.vocal_body: Every souvenir you buy from a local artisan, and every meal you eat at a local eatery, directly supports an Indian family and preserves our heritage.
initiatives.sustainable_body: We promote eco-friendly destinations and responsible tourism practices to ensure our natural beauty lasts for generations.
initiatives.pledge_text: "I pledge to travel India, explore its hidden gems, and support local communities whenever possible."
initiatives.pledge_alert_msg: Thank you for pledging to support local businesses and travel domestically. Your small choices make a big difference!

provider.info_text: Join our community of verified local guides and artisans. Your profile will be visible once verified.
provider.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.
